function.name: file_write_full
function.description: Write the contents to a file

name.description: The name of the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

function.name: file_read_full
function.description: Read the full contents of a file.

name.description: The name of the file to read.

function.name: file_read_lines
function.description: Read the specified lines of a file.

name.description: The name of the file to write.

start.description: The line at which to start reading.

stop.description: The line at which to stop reading.
